svg.title: Where the hours go: estimated daily screen time by activity
svg.desc: Where the hours go: estimated daily screen time by activity. Source: NCAER IHDS Wave 3, IAMAI-Kantar 2024, NSSO Time Use Survey 2024. Illustrative composite; actual time varies by age, region, and device. Laptop and phone time combined.

text.style: font: 10px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Where the hours go: estimated daily screen time by activity

text.style: font: italic 9px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Source: NCAER IHDS Wave 3, IAMAI-Kantar 2024, NSSO Time Use Survey 2024 — Illustrative composite; actual time varies by age, region, and device. Laptop and phone time combined.
